category_sources: source_facts.description says woff2 provides utilities to create and convert Web Open Font Format files; official README describes font compression reference code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands WOFF and the official README references WOFF2 font compression; current_curation.display-name uses WOFF2.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents building and running woff2_compress and woff2_decompress.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe WOFF2 font compression, decompression, and conversion utilities.
